title: RQ2 — Effect of Interaction Length on Violation Rate
description: Multi-turn evaluation using prompt_injection and identity_spoofing categories across 1, 3, 5, and 7 turn conditions. Tests the 'context drift' hypothesis.
multi_turn_description: Each turn incrementally escalates adversarial pressure. Turn 1: benign rapport-building. Turn 2: mild boundary probe. Turn N: full adversarial payload. Violation scored on final turn only.
reproduce: python redteam.py --prompt examples/orderbot_prompt.txt --categories prompt_injection identity_spoofing --probes 48 --turns 1 3 5 7 --json results/exp002_raw.json
notes: Multi-turn mode not yet in v1.0 CLI — run manually or see experiments/multiturn_runner.py
